name: Kelly 35 handbag
description:
2020 Unused Hermes Kelly 35 Picnic Fauve Barenia with Silver Palladium Hardware.

This is definitely a unique and desired bag. Crafted of wicker and Fauve Barenia heritage leather.

The bag has been kept unused. However, due to the nature of Barenia leather, there may be signs of storage rubbing. Also, 2 of the plastics came off the hardware (turnlock and interior under flap fitting). But there are no scratches to the hardware.

The bag will come with the Box, Original Receipt, 2x Dustbags, Bababebi CoA ($300 CoA), Felt Protector, Care Cards, Lock, 2x Keys, Clochette & Ribbon.

Officially renamed in 1977, the Hermès Kelly was originally called the Sac à Dépêches (which translates to ‘the dispatch bag’). The structured bag’s moniker came into effect in the ‘50s, when Grace Kelly was given one of the bags after wearing it on the set of an Albert Hitchcock movie.

name: Kelly Mini leather handbag
description:
An absolute treasure from 1989! This vintage Hermès Mini Kelly 20 Sellier in black Box leather with gold-toned hardware is perfect for cocktail receptions and formal dinners. With its top handle, detachable shoulder strap and tonal interior pocket, it moves effortlessly from evening affairs to polished daytime outings, delivering authentic Hermès sophistication to every ensemble.
• Black Box leather
• Gold-toned hardware
• Single top handle
• Tonal leather lining with one internal pocket
• Flap top with turn-lock closure
• Vintage
Comes with shoulder strap and dustbag. Date code circle S.

name: Kelly 32 leather bag
description:
Hermès Kelly 32 in Evercolor Leather with Gold Hardware – Stamp P (2012)

A classic Hermès Kelly 32 crafted in Evercolor leather, known for its smooth texture and elegant structure. Finished with gold hardware, this piece is timeless and easy to style for any occasion.

The color is a rich, vibrant blue with a clean and refined tone, not too dark, yet not overly bright. It has a crisp, polished look that stands out while remaining versatile.

This pre-loved bag is in very good condition, with minor signs of wear from normal use. There are light scratches on the hardware and a natural patina over time. The bag remains well-shaped and well-kept. Condition is exactly as shown in the photos (100%).

Details:
• Stamp: P (2012)
• Material: Evercolor leather
• Hardware: Gold
• Size: 32 × 23 × 10.5 cm
• Includes: Long strap, clochette, padlock & keys, dust bag, and copy of receipt
A timeless and elegant piece with a bold yet wearable color.

name: Kelly 28 leather handbag
description:
Hermes Kelly Sellier 28 In Bleu Indigo Epsom With Gold Hardware Y Stamp

From 2020 (purchased August 2021), this classic handbag is absolutely stunning. It is crafted of Epsom leather in Bleu Indigo, a deep rich navy that borders on black, and features a leather top handle, an optional shoulder strap, and gold-plated hardware. The flap opens to a matching goatskin leather interior with zipper and patch pockets.

This preloved Kelly 28 is in very good condition. It has beautiful structure, protective film on all hardware with the exception of the shoulder strap and there are no visible scuffs. Photos were taken in different light to show color variation.

There are some creases on the back where the flap opens which are more prevalent on the right side. There are normal soft impressions in the interior and the shoulder strap has a “twist” or kink in it which appears to be from storage. There are very fine scratches on the hardware without film and some tarnishing on the plaque rivets, as well. The corners are super clean as is the interior.

Comes with removable shoulder strap, box (has wear), all dust bags, lock and keys, clochette, protective felt, care book and original receipt

name: Constance leather handbag
description:
Preowned in excellent condition.

There is little-to-no visible wear, with protective plastic intact on the hardware.
The Constance 18 Mini is one of Hermès’ most sought-after silhouettes, defined by its clean lines and signature “H” clasp. Crafted from Evercolor leather in Bleu Zanzibar, the structured exterior maintains a crisp, architectural form while offering durability and resistance to scratches. The deep blue tone is complemented by polished gold-tone hardware, creating a refined contrast.

The design features a double-gusset interior, opening to two main compartments with additional slip pockets for organized storage. The adjustable leather strap allows for both crossbody wear and a shorter shoulder carry when doubled. This example is marked with a Z stamp, indicating 2021 production, and retains its full set with protective elements intact.

name: Birkin 35 leather handbag
description:
This is an authentic HERMES courchevel Birkin 35 in ebene. Hermès Ébène (Ebony) is a deep, rich, and timeless dark brown shade, often considered the closest brown to black, making it a sophisticated, versatile neutral. It has subtle warm red or mahogany undertones, appearing as a dark espresso shade, and is highly regarded as a softer alternative to Noir.
This iconic handbag features rolled leather top handles, a front flap with strap closure, and polished gold plated hardware. The top flap opens to a matching brown chèvre leather interior with a zipper pocket and patch pockets. Stamp circle Z.

name: Kelly 28 leather handbag
description:
Rare Good Condition Kelly 28 – Natural Epsom (Old Courchevel)
This Kelly 28 is crafted from Old Courchevel, a type of cowhide leather that was discontinued in 2000. In 2004, its successor became known as Grand Epsom. This leather is highly prized for its durability, refined texture, and structured appearance. It is most commonly used in Kelly Sellier models, where the exterior stitching enhances the bag’s luxurious, elegant look while making it stronger than many other leathers.
	•	Hardware: Gold (GHW)
	•	Stamp: Z in a circle (1996)
	•	Details: Original, neat, and elegant Sellier stitching. The only distinction lies in the strap hook. While it cannot be compared to current models in terms of price, its quality remains timeless and of international standard.

Comes with: Hermès box, Hermès dust bag, strap, key set, and authentication card from Vestiaire.

Note: This beloved vintage piece has been professionally retouched including a handle replacement by Hermès. A copy of the Hermès receipt is included.

This bag has been authenticated by Vestiaire.

name: Tasche Collier d'Attelage
description:
Tasche aus Box-Kalbsleder  - Verschluss mit Lederlasche - Innentasche - Flache Außentasche auf der Rückseite - Verstellbarer Schulterriemen - Zum Tragen über der Schulter oder diagonal am Körper. Abmessungen: L 23 x H 20 x T 5 cm | Länge des Schulterriemens: 107 cm. Mehr erfahren über das Box-Kalbsleder
 Dieses Kalbsleder ist ein unverkennbares Merkmal des Hauses. Seinen Namen verdankt es der "Box"-Gerbung, die englischen Ursprungs ist. Durch dieses spezifische Savoir-faire erhält es ein besonderes Erscheinungsbild, das die intensiven dunklen Farben besonders hervorhebt.
 In der Kollektion verwendet seit: 1920er Jahre
 Optische Eigenschaften: Glatt und glänzend, nuancierte Tiefe, längliche und feine Narbung
 Oberflächenbeschaffenheit: Poliert und glatt
 Hand: Rund, fest und voll
 Entwicklung im Laufe der Zeit: Empfindlich, anfangs kratzempfindlich, setzt später eine schöne Patina an, der Glanz verschwindet, bewahrt seine Form
dimensions: L 23 x H 20 x T 5 cm

name: Birkin 35 leather handbag
description:
This is an authentic HERMES courchevel Birkin 35 in Rough H. This iconic handbag features rolled leather top handles, a front flap with strap closure, and polished gold plated hardware. The top flap opens to a matching brown chèvre leather interior with a zipper pocket and patch pockets. Stamp square B. 
No Hermès color embodies the brand’s history like Rouge H. Introduced nearly a century ago, it remains the House’s signature shade — a deep, wine-inflected red that’s equal parts heritage and modern luxury. In certain lights, Rouge H leans toward mahogany; in others, a rich cherry-burgundy. Its brown undertones make it endlessly wearable, pairing beautifully with neutrals like Gold, Etoupe, and Etain, or with warm accents like Barenia and Chocolate. Collectors adore Rouge H in Box Calf, Epsom, and Courchevel leather — especially with gold hardware, where the shade’s depth and warmth truly come alive. This color is often seen as “the” Hermès red: sophisticated, understated, and deeply Parisian.

name: Birkin 35 leather handbag
description:
This is an authentic HERMES Swift Birkin 35 in Pelouse. Hermès Swift leather (formerly Gulliver) is a smooth, fine-grained calfskin reintroduced in 2005, prized for its buttery-soft texture, slouchy structure, and exceptional ability to absorb vibrant colors.  This sophisticated handbag is expertly crafted from green smooth, supple leather. The bag features rolled leather top handles, a frontal flap, a hanging clochette, and polished palladium hardware, including a turn lock, padlock, and key. The top flap opens to a matching leather interior with a zipper and patch pockets. Date code square M. 
Hermès Pelouse emerges as one of the most evocatively verdant and expressively pastoral hues in the luxury house’s distinguished color portfolio. This sophisticated, lawn-inspired shade encapsulates a compelling landscape narrative—simultaneously referencing the manicured perfection of cultivated grounds and the refined natural splendor of European garden traditions—creating a color that projects curated botanical elegance while maintaining the sublime execution synonymous with the heritage brand. Pelouse occupies a distinctive position in the Hermès spectrum—a refined, landscape-derived hue with remarkable chromatic vitality that draws inspiration from both aristocratic garden heritage and contemporary appreciation of manicured natural aesthetics while embodying the meticulous sophistication expected from this storied maison.
What distinguishes Pelouse is its exceptional landscape resonance and cultivated authenticity. Unlike more conventionally green Hermès colors such as the raw Vert Cru or the deep Vert Foncé, Pelouse offers a more distinctly curated quality with substantial chromatic vibrancy that gives it a sophisticated, almost horticulturally precise character. This perfectly calibrated color profile allows Pelouse to function as both a heritage landscape statement and a versatile expression of refined natural cultivation—an evocative choice for the Hermès client who values colors with horticultural significance and authentic garden-inspired refinement.

name: Kelly 35 leather handbag
description:
Not currently available anywhere on the market, this ultra-rare limited edition Hermés Kelly 35 is having a tricolor moment made up of the perfect neutrals: Tabac Camel, Argile, Chocolat. The coveted 35cm size strikes the perfect balance between elegance and practicality—roomy enough for daily essentials while maintaining the sleek, iconic Kelly silhouette. Crafted in the rare brushed gold hardware, a hardware rarely used in Hermes pieces. A true testament to Hermès' heritage and craftsmanship. Date code square G. NO CLOTCHETTE, NO PADLOCK. Comes with strap only. scratch on flap, wear on corners, small stains on leather (mostly bottom).

name: Kelly 32 leather handbag
description:
Hermès Kelly 32 Bag – Vintage 1991 piece- Gold Courchevel Leather with Gold Hardware
Timeless and elegant, this Hermès Kelly 32 is crafted from durable Courchevel leather in a rich brown shade, beautifully complemented by classic gold-plated hardware. Known for its refined cross-grain texture and exceptional structure, Courchevel leather was widely used by Hermès in the 1980s and 1990s and remains highly regarded for its resistance to scratches and ability to maintain the Kelly’s iconic silhouette.
The bag features the signature top handle design, a structured trapezoid shape, and the classic turn-lock closure with clochette. The warm brown tone paired with gold hardware creates a versatile and sophisticated look suitable for both day and evening wear.
Sized at 32 cm, this Kelly offers generous interior space while maintaining the refined proportions that make the style so iconic. The interior is lined in coordinating leather and provides practical storage for daily essentials. Date code circle U (made in 1991). Comes with clotchette, padlock and keys.

name: Kelly 35 leather handbag
description:
Hermès Kelly 35 – Box Calf – Ebene Brown – 1993 
An extraordinary vintage Hermès Kelly 35 crafted in classic Box Calf leather in rich Ebene (dark chocolate) brown, dating to 1993. 
Box Calf from the 1990s is highly coveted for its structured silhouette, glossy finish, and the way it develops a refined patina over time. Finding a Kelly of this era in excellent condition, with clean corners, strong structure, and beautiful surface sheen, is increasingly rare. Many examples from this period show significant wear or loss of shape—this one presents beautifully and has been exceptionally preserved.
The 35cm size offers elegant proportions—large enough for everyday sophistication, yet timeless and ladylike in silhouette. The deep Ebene shade is one of Hermès’ most classic and versatile browns, pairing effortlessly with both neutrals and richer tones. Comes with removable strap,clochette, padlock, keys and dustbag.

name: Kelly Dépêches leather handbag
description:
AUTH Hermes Kelly Depeches Briefcase, Rouge H, RARE BOX LEATHER!

Coveted Hermès Kelly Depeches handbag! This is not the normal size 34 or 25 style like you see EVERYWHERE. This is the very rare Size 38 version. This also isn't the common Epsom or Togo leather version; this is in beautiful BOX leather.

This is the epitome of Hermès craftsmanship, and traces its silhouette and roots to the very first Kelly bags from 70 years ago; worn by Hollywood elite, royalty, and First Ladies. A Kelly Depeches in this size and this color AND in BOX LEATHER is virtually impossible to find. This is the dream combination! Get this one while you can!

This bag is of course 100% guaranteed AUTHENTIC, but do realize it is used and may have some flaws. I purchased it and quickly realized I already had too many similarly sized bags, including another Kelly Depeches and other luxury French fashion houses bags. So my loss is your gain!

Its features include:

-Leather rolled top handle
-Smooth box leather
-Palladium Kelly closure and hardware
-the option to add a removable shoulder strap...which transforms this iconic style into a multi-functional piece; switch from a classic tote/briefcase to a crossbody or shoulder bag in one fell swoop.

*Note: clochette and lock/keys not included.

Being Hermès, the craftsmanship is impeccable and much attention to detail was given. Just holding it your hand or wearing it across your body, you can feel the sheer luxury.

If you aren't buying it for yourself, it would make a fabulous gift!


Please view all pics closely and ask all questions/additional photos prior to bidding. *There may be small imperfections, as this is box leather it shows it character; but that no bearing on the overall beauty of the exterior.

Buy with confidence as I have listed and sold countless luxury goods. I am a connoisseur so all of my items are 100% AUTHENTIC and personally curated/purchased/owned by me.

name: Kelly 32 leather handbag
description:
Iconic Hermès Kelly 32 bag in black from 1949, a rare collector's item from the first decades of the house of Hermès.

The bag has been refurbished (cleaning, seam repair, handle replacement, leather care), and remains perfectly wearable.

name: Tasche Hermès Geta
description:
Tasche aus Mysore-Ziegenleder  - "H"-Schließe mit farblich abgestimmten Lederintarsien - Mittelfach - Zwei aufgesetzte Innentaschen (davon eine mit zwei Fächern) - Verstellbarer Fibre-Gurt als Schulterriemen - Zum Tragen über der Schulter oder diagonal am Körper  Die Schließe ist ein multifunktionales Element, das als Magnetschließe, Taschenfuß und Verstellsystem für den Schulterriemen dient.  Dieser Artikel ist handgefertigt. Die genauen Abmessungen können daher variieren.. Abmessungen: L 20 x H 15 x T 7 cm | Länge des Schulterriemens ohne Karabiner: 61–120 cm. Mehr erfahren über das Mysore-Ziegenleder
 Wie seine Namensgebung in Anlehnung an die gleichnamige südindische Stadt vermuten lässt, stammt das unbehandelte Leder aus Indien. Sein Markenzeichen ist seine besondere Narbung, die durch die Chagrin-Technik erhalten wird. Dabei wird das Leder auf der Narbenseite aneinander gerieben, um die Narbung auszurichten. Dies kann in einer Richtung erfolgen, um ein feines Linienmuster zu erhalten, oder aber in verschiedenen Richtungen.
 In der Kollektion verwendet seit: 1990er Jahre
 Optische Eigenschaften: Unregelmäßige aber harmonische Narbung, leichter Glanz, der die natürlichen Eigenschaften des Ziegenleders offenbart
 Oberflächenbeschaffenheit: Eher trocken, wird im Laufe der Zeit weicher
 Hand: Biegsam
 Entwicklung im Laufe der Zeit: Wird geschmeidiger und seidig
dimensions: L 20 x H 15 x T 7 cm

name: Herbag handbag
description: Hermes Herbag Zip 31 in a sophisticated Etoupe canvas with Fauve Vache Hunter leather trim. This versatile handbag features the iconic Kelly-style closure, a convenient exterior rear zipper pocket, and a matching removable interior pouch. The design includes a single top handle and a long shoulder strap for multiple carrying options. Polished palladium-plated hardware adds a refined touch to the durable Officier canvas body. This classic piece combines the elegance of the Kelly silhouette with the practicality of a casual tote, making it an essential addition to any luxury collection.

name: Leather travel bag
description:
Authentic Hermès Drag Travel Bag. Very rare. Beautiful and timeless. Circa 1988. 55cm, vintage, gold leather and canvas, notched flap, double handle.

Condition: This piece was obviously very well loved. There are spots, water marks, general wear, cracks in leather, missing foot on bottom, but is still a solid heirloom and has lots of life left. Base has a removable insert.
Overall fair vintage condition.


​The "Drag" takes its name from a type of horse-drawn carriage, staying true to Hermès’ equestrian roots. In the 1980s, these were the ultimate understated travel statement—designed for people who wanted the craftsmanship of the Rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré without the obvious logos of the era.

This was the same year they celebrated their 150th anniversary (with the "Year of the Exotic" theme), and the quality of the Toile canvas and gold leather from this specific year is highly regarded for its durability.

The leather is likely Vache Naturelle with a patina and some water and oil marks.
 
Fantastic weekender or large carry-on.

 Optische Eigenschaften: Kleine, regelmäßige und leicht glänzende Narbung, einheitlich, tiefe Farben
 Oberflächenbeschaffenheit: Trocken, mit einer leichten Narbung auf zwei Ebenen
 Hand: Rund und fest
 Entwicklung im Laufe der Zeit: Formbeständig, kratzfest. Die Narbung verwischt an stark beanspruchten oder Reibung unterliegenden Stellen

name: Kelly leather belt
description:
Brand New.

The Kelly 18 belt draws directly from the house’s iconic Kelly bag, translating its signature hardware into a refined, minimalist accessory. Rendered in Rouge H, one of Hermès’ most historic shades, the deep wine-toned leather carries rich undertones that shift subtly between mahogany and dark cherry depending on the light. The slender 18 mm profile maintains a clean, architectural line, while the polished Kelly turn-lock closure provides a distinctive focal point. Designed with an adjustable sliding system, the belt offers a flexible fit that can be styled at the waist or hips, balancing functionality with understated elegance.

Please check images for details.
Box and dustbags included.
Size (approx.):

Length: Adjustable 60–100 cm / 23.62–39.37 in
Width: 1.8 cm / 0.71 in
Features:

Brand: Hermès
Model: Kelly 18 Belt
Material: Leather
Color: Rouge H
Hardware: Palladium-Tone
Closure: Kelly Turn-Lock
Made in: France
Department: Women

name: Kelly watch
description: The most Hermès of Hermès watches. Directly inspired by the clasp of the legendary Kelly bag, this golden padlock that hangs delicately on the wrist has become an absolute classic of the house from Faubourg Saint-Honoré. Delivered with its original Hermès strap and buckle.
